addons.name: TR PDF Converter
addons.description: Native Trade Republic PDF parser — extracts cash, MMF, trading P&L. Direct one-click import to Donkeyfolio activities (auto-creates TR account, extracts quantity + unit price). Translated status + type labels, cleaner names. Ported from jcmpagel's open-source code.
addons.author: Donkeyfolio
addons.releaseNotes: v2.2.1: Translates German cash/MMF type labels (Handel, Kartenzahlung, Sparplan, Überweisung, Zinsen, Dividende, …) for older TR statement formats. Also ships v2.2.0: Direct 'Import to Donkeyfolio' button auto-creates TR account and imports BUY/SELL/DEPOSIT/WITHDRAWAL/INTEREST. Quantity + unit price extraction. English status labels. Filter only failed sanity checks for cash.
